security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:1420 ws://127.0.0.1:1420; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first study library for educational media
bundle.longDescription: Duroos Watcher imports, organizes, and plays educational media locally, with signed protocol-based channels for teacher and curator publishing.
